title: Aramex India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aramex India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
